description: Asset Vision provides cloud software for infrastructure asset management, including asset registers, maintenance planning, mobile field workflows, and AI-assisted defect detection. It serves government and enterprise organizations managing roads, ports, utilities, facilities, and other physical assets.
summary: Asset Vision exposes a documented OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://mcp.assetvision.com.au/mcp`; its website also advertises open API/cloud integration capabilities, but no public REST/GraphQL spec or CLI documentation was found.
